emails.subject: Oasis Pipe Line Company
emails.body: Oasis Pipe Line Company I have three other contract which need to be terminated. I have termination letters effective October 22, 1997. Please let me know if there are any deals attached to these contracts before I terminate them in the system. 1. 96006408 2. 96006409 3. 96006412 Please respond as soon as possible. Marlene Hilliard

emails.subject: Re: Oasis Pipe Line Company
emails.body: Re: Oasis Pipe Line Company Marlene, After discussions with the desk, we have decided to keep the Oasis contracts under ENA. So, we don't need to sign the contracts you sent earlier. Let me know if you have any questions. D Marlene Hilliard 08/31/2000 12:36 PM
